mission: Implement the smallest Medulla V0 filesystem loop required by TinkerDen Bridge.
context: Primary build is TinkerDen Bridge V0 plus Medulla V0. Ben needs commands issued from TinkerDen / ThinkIt to produce ACK, BLOCKER, or ARTIFACT receipts without Ben manually carrying packets.
do: Use tinkerden/inbox as the command packet source.
Use tinkerden/receipts as the receiver receipt destination.
Use tinkerden/recommendations/recommendation_cards.json as the recommendation card output.
Use tinkerden/feedback/decision-ledger.jsonl as the decision ledger output.
Implement or update tinkerden/medulla/medulla.js for the Medulla V0 filesystem loop.
Return a receipt in tinkerden/receipts that preserves this packet_id as source_packet_id.
do_not: Do not build Nerdkle or NMCLR.
Do not create vector DB work.
Do not assign anything to Ender@Sally.
Do not assign a machine without an Aeye.
Do not claim sent, posted, queued, or written as proof.
Do not call this sample file proof of runtime behavior.
output_required: Concrete Medulla V0 implementation artifact at tinkerden/medulla/medulla.js plus a linked receipt in tinkerden/receipts, or a BLOCKER naming the exact missing repo, path, input, or human gate.
